item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 22min For sure. You can't take your eyes off Ali Carter when he's playing. Compelling cha
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 22min For sure. You can't take your eyes off Ali Carter when he's playing. Compelling character. Cita Simon Gray @siborg147 · 47min En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe It’s the first time I’ve seen him live up close today, and loved it. He is so entertaining with his reactions to everything going on both on the table and off it, and he’s a bloody good player too. Hopefully he gets drawn in a game I am seeing at the crucible too. 1 581

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 41min “Look to German darts for example what happened to the [Martin] Schindlers and Max Hopp, all t
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 41min “Look to German darts for example what happened to the [Martin] Schindlers and Max Hopp, all the pressure got to them.”
Michael van Gerwen admits home-soil expectation can derail players.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/van-gerwen-war ns-home-soil-pressure-can-derail-top-stars/ …
In association with @DiamondXDraws

item.title:
OfficialOLDarts: Phill Barrs reposteó Online Darts @OfficialOLDarts · 52min “It’s nothing.”
@MvG180 refuses to fuel the Littler–Van
item.description:
Phill Barrs reposteó Online Darts @OfficialOLDarts · 52min “It’s nothing.”
@MvG180 refuses to fuel the Littler–Van Veen debate
“I know what you want me to say… but I’m not saying it.”
Full interview
https:// youtu.be/9RvhLq_OPfo?si =GQt3kcvC11Kb73Zk … 4 13 5 mil
